# Gym Training Tracker - Project Setup

## Project Overview
Full-stack application for tracking gym training sessions with React frontend and Node.js/Express backend.

## Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify copilot-instructions.md created
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task
- [x] Launch the Project
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Progress Notes
- Created full-stack project structure (client + server folders)
- Set up TypeScript configuration for both client and server
- Created React + Vite frontend with Axios for API calls
- Created Node.js/Express backend with TypeScript support
- Configured npm workspaces for unified project management
- Generated README.md with setup instructions
- All dependencies installed successfully (183 packages)
- Build completed without errors
- Created VS Code tasks for development workflow
